## What tool are you adding?

- **Name:**
- **URL:**
- **Category:**
- **Why it fits:**

## Checklist

- [ ] One tool per PR
- [ ] Added the entry to **`data/tools.yml`** (not to README directly)
- [ ] Picked the right `category`
- [ ] Description is neutral, factual, ≤ 90 chars, in **both** `en` and `ru`
- [ ] The repository URL is **live** and **not archived**
- [ ] Ran `python scripts/generate_readme.py` and committed the regenerated `README.md` + `README.ru.md`
- [ ] The tool is **not a duplicate** of an existing entry
